mapper.select: SELECT * FROM questions WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO questions (content, type, difficulty, grade_id, teacher_id, analysis) VALUES (#{content}, #{type}, #{difficulty}, #{gradeId}, #{teacherId}, #{analysis})
mapper.update: UPDATE questions SET content=#{content}, type=#{type}, difficulty=#{difficulty}, grade_id=#{gradeId}, analysis=#{analysis}, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE questions SET status=0 WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM questions WHERE status=1 AND id IN #{id}
